Toast nori sheets over the grill until the seaweed dries up and seizes slightly.  Grind into powder.
In a robot coupe, grind the cashews until they cream but before they turn to a nut butter
In a mixing bowl, add all ingredients including nori powder and cashews, mix until combined with a whisk.
Reserve in quart containers and store in the cooler
